title: TriageWindowLabel
description: Per-window triage label for the forward-looking telemetry-to-Jira decision task. Defined in docs/triage-task-contract.md.

window_type.description: Telemetry window phase, e.g. pre_fault_baseline, active_fault, recovery_window, observation_window.

triage_severity.description: Required when triage_label is ticket_worthy. Must be null otherwise.

triage_components.description: Jira components the ticket would carry. Required when triage_label is ticket_worthy.

triage_reason_class.description: Coarse reason class for ticket-worthy windows. Required when triage_label is ticket_worthy.

is_hard_case.description: True if this window is intentionally designed to confuse simple models. Analysis use only; not a model input.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this label was assigned.

source.description: Origin of the label. See docs/triage-task-contract.md.

adjudicator.description: Identifier of the reviewer when source is human_adjudicated.

derived_rule_id.description: Identifier of the derivation rule when source is derived. Example: derive-from-jira-candidate-v1.
